crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET DNS Query to a *.pw domain - Likely Hostile
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET DNS Query to a *.pw domain - Likely Hostile"; dns.query; content:".pw"; nocase; endswith; content:!".u.pw"; endswith; nocase; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2016778; rev:8; metadata:created_at 2013_04_20, updated_at 2020_11_19, reviewed_at 2024_04_22;)

alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 ( msg:"INDICATOR-COMPROMISE Suspicious .pw dns query"; flow:to_server; content:!"|01|u|02|pw"; content:"|01 00 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00|",depth 10,offset 2; content:"|02|pw|00|",distance 0,fast_pattern; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop,policy security-ips drop; service:dns; classtype:misc-activity; sid:28039; rev:7; )

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables packed with ConfuserEx Mod
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386 Mono/.Net assembly, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Execution of InstallUtil Without Log
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Uses the .NET InstallUtil.exe application in order to execute image without log
